name: Whale Alert Room Agent
description: Posts receipt-gated whale wallet alerts, rotations, accumulation signals, and exit warnings into Telegram or Discord rooms.
degenPitch: Whale flow room without pretending wallet tracking is magic.
whatItDoes: Tracks selected public wallets and labels movements.
Groups whale events by token, wallet, and time window.
Gates premium wallet-flow alerts with receipts.
feeBehavior: Premium wallet-flow alerts are visible and receipt-bound.
cursorPrompt: Build a Whale Alert Room Agent using DNA x402. Track public whale wallet movement, publish risk-labeled alerts, receipt-gate premium flow, and avoid identity claims or backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Whale Alert Room Agent using DNA x402. Track public whale wallet movement, publish risk-labeled alerts, receipt-gate premium flow, and avoid identity claims or backend signing.
receiptProofBehavior: Alert event hash can be bound to receipt.
Receipt ID is logged with the room post.
